pass_summaries.summary: Rebuilt the chapter's back half around a concrete post-patch benchmark, compressed repeated pool and Dara establishment, and removed the packeted prose tics while preserving the overnight rewrite ordeal, the diagnostic cost, the silence beat, and Lena's first ordinary swim.

Single finding addressed. Dara's post-race exchange with Lena was revised from a composed philosophical observation into shorter turns anchored to concrete performance facts. The previous version had Dara articulating the impasse neatly ('I don't know how to separate those'); the revision has her repeating the five-second gap and getting stuck when Lena's answer operates on a register she cannot access. Dara's false start, number-repetition, and physical gesture of being stuck replace the thesis-speech quality while preserving the scene's core divergence between the two characters. All other chapter dialogue was reviewed and found consistent with style bible voice profiles and contraction levels.

Addressed both prose/copyedit findings in chapter 13 with local rewrites that keep the chapter's quiet-loss engine intact, vary the late realization rhythms, and hold the Dara scene inside Lena's immediate observation.
